message:
beads: start bd-lff4p.5.10

Mark "Alien Artifact: statistical perf regression detection (e-values/Bayes)"
as in_progress — initial interleaved-measurement and rerun-on-fail work has
landed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-lff4p.5","title":"FrankenTerm and ftui-web QA: golden traces, fuzz, extreme optimization","description":"Scope
- Correctness and performance engineering for the entire FrankenTerm + ftui-web stack (core/web/native/remote).

Deliverables
- Golden systems
  - Versioned trace format + replay engine + checksum gates
  - Renderer-level goldens (frame/pixel hashes) for web
- Test stack
  - Proptest invariants + fuzz targets for parsers/state machines
  - Native PTY E2E scripts with detailed JSONL logging
  - Web/remote E2E scripts with deterministic traces + JSONL
- CI + Perf gates
  - wasm build checks
  - time-bounded fuzz/proptest smoke
  - trace replay gates
  - benchmark/perf regression thresholds (with optional statistical guards)

Operating Principle
- Every optimization is single-lever, measured, and backed by isomorphism proof + golden verification.
","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:49:36.166705937Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T09:16:59.671450506Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.5","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:49:36.166705937Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.5.1","title":"Design: golden trace format for terminal sessions (native + web)","description":"Goal
- Define a stable, versioned trace format we can use to reproduce bugs and gate regressions across core/web/native/remote.

Format Requirements
- Inputs
  - output byte streams (VT/ANSI) and/or patches
  - input events (keyboard/mouse/touch/IME)
  - resize events
  - tick/time deltas (explicitly injected)
- Checkpoints
  - frame hashes and/or patch hashes
  - optional grid snapshots for debugging
- Metadata
  - run_id, git_sha/build_id, seed
  - size, DPR (web), terminal profile/capabilities, TERM identity (remote)
  - perf counters: timing histograms, patch sizes, bytes in/out

Design Constraints
- Forward-migratable schema (versioned, with strict validation).
- Reducible/minimizable: traces must be amenable to automatic minimization (delta debugging).

Acceptance Criteria
- Trace format is versioned and forward-migratable.
- Can be produced by native E2E scripts, web harnesses, and remote PTY sessions.
- Validator produces actionable errors (line + field context).
","notes":"Drafted canonical trace spec at docs/spec/frankenterm-golden-trace-format.md (JSONL bundle layout, record types, hashing/normalization, payload sidecars, CI validation + minimization strategy).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"PinkMill","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:55:10.780434801Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T18:45:08.703034522Z","closed_at":"2026-02-08T18:45:08.703008854Z","close_reason":"Completed: docs/spec/frankenterm-golden-trace-format.md","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.5.1","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:55:10.780434801Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.5.1","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:55:10.780434801Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"bd-lff4p.5.10","title":"Alien Artifact: statistical perf regression detection (e-values/Bayes)","description":"Goal
- Reduce perf-gate false positives while catching real regressions using principled statistics.

Alien Artifact Techniques
- Anytime-valid hypothesis testing via e-values/e-processes (optional stopping safe).
- Bayesian performance model (posterior over regression magnitude) + Bayes factors for evidence strength.
- Explicit expected-loss decision rule:
  - define loss matrix for false positive (wasted engineer time) vs false negative (shipping regression)
  - choose thresholds/policies that minimize expected loss under measured noise.

Deliverables
- A confidence report and evidence ledger per perf gate:
  - p-value alternatives (e-values), posterior summaries, and Bayes factors
  - dataset summary (runs, variance, hardware)
  - decision + rationale
- Clear override/rollback policy when noise dominates.

Acceptance Criteria
- Perf gates become robust: materially fewer flaky failures without letting real regressions through.
- Outputs are machine-readable and human-auditable.
","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:13:19.554603628Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T09:25:06.635143696Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.5.10","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:13:19.554603628Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.5.10","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.5.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:13:19.554603628Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.5.10","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:13:19.554603628Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"bd-lff4p.5.11","title":"CI: run native PTY E2E suite + validate JSONL","description":"Goal
- Ensure the existing PTY-based E2E suite stays green as we replace Crossterm and evolve the stack.

Scope
- Run `tests/e2e/scripts/run_all.sh` (or a curated subset) in CI.
- Validate JSONL logs using the shared schema/validator.

Acceptance Criteria
- CI produces artifacts: JSONL logs + failing trace excerpts.
- Failures link back to minimal repro scripts.
","notes":"Implemented in `.github/workflows/ci.yml` (`e2e-pty` job):
- PTY step now runs `tests/e2e/scripts/run_all.sh` explicitly (native PTY suite entrypoint).
- Kept strict JSONL validation against `tests/e2e/lib/e2e_jsonl_schema.json` and hash registry.
- Added `Build PTY failure repro bundle` step (`if: always()`) that emits:
  - `minimal_repros.md` (failed test -> minimal repro script path)
  - `*_excerpt.log` snippets around failure markers
  - `*_pty_head.hex` first 512 bytes for failed PTY captures
  - copied per-run `summary.json`
- Added always-on JSONL artifact upload (`e2e-pty-jsonl-${{ matrix.os }}`) and repro-bundle upload (`e2e-pty-failure-bundle-${{ matrix.os }}`).

Validation:
- YAML parse check passed via Ruby `YAML.load_file`.
- Shell syntax check passed for `tests/e2e/scripts/run_all.sh` and `scripts/e2e_test.sh`.
- Local sanity run: `tests/e2e/scripts/run_all.sh --quick` produced summary + JSONL + logs under `/tmp/ftui_e2e_ci_sanity_1`.
- Repro-bundle logic dry-run produced `minimal_repros.md`, excerpts, and PTY hex artifacts; sample mapping resolved `inline_basic` -> `tests/e2e/scripts/test_inline.sh`.

Repo-wide gate context during this session:
- `cargo check --all-targets`: passed.
- `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`: fails in unrelated `frankenterm-web` borrow-check changes (`E0499` in `crates/frankenterm-web/src/glyph_atlas.rs`).
- `cargo fmt --check`: fails due pre-existing formatting diffs in unrelated `frankenterm-web` files.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"PearlForge","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:13:45.956127569Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T20:28:01.901082531Z","closed_at":"2026-02-08T20:28:01.901063074Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.5.11","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.4.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:13:45.956127569Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.5.11","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:13:45.956127569Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.5.11","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.5.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:13:45.956127569Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.5.12","title":"CI: run golden trace replay gates (core + web + remote)","description":"Goal
- Turn the golden corpus into a hard regression gate.

Scope
- Replay traces through:
  - frankenterm-core (parser/grid)
  - ftui-web runner (state machine + rendering)
  - remote bridge loop (where feasible)

Acceptance Criteria
- CI fails on checksum mismatches with actionable diffs (frame/event indices).
- Time-bounded execution for PRs; expanded coverage on nightly.
","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"PearlForge","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:13:46.334998331Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T21:34:49.213928225Z","closed_at":"2026-02-08T21:34:49.213904691Z","close_reason":"Completed: CI golden trace replay gates wired for core/web/harness with bounded PR profile and expanded non-PR profile; remote gate conditional when scripts are available.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.5.12","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:13:46.334998331Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.5.12","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.5.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:13:46.334998331Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.5.12","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.5.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:13:46.334998331Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.5.12","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.5.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:13:46.334998331Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-lff4p.5.13","title":"Alien Artifact: failing-trace minimizer (delta debugging + VOI)","description":"Goal
- When a golden trace fails (checksum mismatch), automatically minimize it to the smallest repro trace that still fails.

Why (User Value)
- Makes regressions debuggable in minutes: a minimized trace is actionable and can be attached to issues/PRs.

Techniques (Alien Artifact)
- Start with classic delta debugging (ddmin) on the event stream.
- Upgrade with Value-of-Information (VOI) heuristics to pick the next reduction step that maximizes expected information gain per replay cost.
- Maintain an evidence ledger: each reduction attempt logs (candidate size, replay time, pass/fail, inferred minimality bounds).

Deliverables
- CLI/API to minimize a trace given a predicate ("replay mismatches").
- Produces a new trace file + a minimization report (JSON/JSONL).

Acceptance Criteria
- On a representative failing trace, produces >=10x size reduction while preserving the failure.
- Deterministic: repeated minimization yields identical minimized trace on same build.
- Integrates into CI failure artifacts (minimized trace attached when feasible/time-bounded).
","notes":"Implemented minimizer in ftui-harness: ddmin + VOI ordering, failure-class-preserving predicate, JSON/JSONL evidence ledger, and env-driven harness entrypoint. Added deterministic + reduction tests in trace_replay. Local validation green: cargo check --all-targets; cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings; cargo test -p ftui-harness trace_replay -- --nocapture. Remaining decision: whether to wire CI artifact publication in this bead or split follow-up.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"BlueHollow","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:24:10.918614366Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T21:41:57.953836625Z","closed_at":"2026-02-08T21:41:57.953817770Z","close_reason":"Implemented ddmin+VOI failing-trace minimizer API/entrypoint with JSON/JSONL reports; deterministic and >=10x reduction validated in tests","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.5.13","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:24:10.918614366Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.5.13","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:24:10.918614366Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-lff4p.5.13","depends_on_id":"bd-lff4p.5.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:24:10.918614366Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
